query:
SELECT 
  o.slug,
  o.name,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as contacts_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as systems_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN conn.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as connectivity_count
FROM organizations o
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON o.id = c.organizationId
LEFT JOIN systems s ON o.id = s.organizationId
LEFT JOIN connectivity conn ON o.id = conn.organizationId
WHERE o.slug = 'RMCA'
GROUP BY o.id, o.slug, o.name;
